examples: She wore a lovely tiara but the groom, not to be outdone, had on a very smart embroidered waistcoat.
He searched his waistcoat, found a purse and pocketed it.
Take off that coat and waistcoat of yours; you're fat enough as it is.
The author's jacket photograph shows a decent-looking, moustached man in a floppy hat, fishing waistcoat and chest waders.
The opinions of this customs collector so far had been as predictable as his waistcoat buttons, if less interesting.
